'''鈭歮-v-sh-s''' ('''kamavshesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cupcake|cupcake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cupcake|cupcake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-v-sh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kamavshesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavshesoko|thimavshesoko]] || [[word:jimavshesoko|jimavshesoko]] || [[word:shimavshesoko|shimavshesoko]] || [[word:kimavshesoko|kimavshesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavshesoko|thuthumavshesoko]] || [[word:jujumavshesoko|jujumavshesoko]] || [[word:shushumavshesoko|shushumavshesoko]] || [[word:kukumavshesoko|kukumavshesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavshesoko|thumavshesoko]] || [[word:jumavshesoko|jumavshesoko]] || [[word:shumavshesoko|shumavshesoko]] || [[word:kumavshesoko|kumavshesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavshesoko|thumavshesoko]] || [[word:jumavshesoko|jumavshesoko]] || [[word:shumavshesoko|shumavshesoko]] || [[word:kumavshesoko|kumavshesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themavshesoko|themavshesoko]] || [[word:jemavshesoko|jemavshesoko]] || [[word:shemavshesoko|shemavshesoko]] || [[word:kemavshesoko|kemavshesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavshesoko|thothomavshesoko]] || [[word:jojomavshesoko|jojomavshesoko]] || [[word:shoshomavshesoko|shoshomavshesoko]] || [[word:kokomavshesoko|kokomavshesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavshesoko|thomavshesoko]] || [[word:jomavshesoko|jomavshesoko]] || [[word:shomavshesoko|shomavshesoko]] || [[word:komavshesoko|komavshesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavshesoko|thomavshesoko]] || [[word:jomavshesoko|jomavshesoko]] || [[word:shomavshesoko|shomavshesoko]] || [[word:komavshesoko|komavshesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mavshesoko|th忙mavshesoko]] || [[word:j忙mavshesoko|j忙mavshesoko]] || [[word:sh忙mavshesoko|sh忙mavshesoko]] || [[word:k忙mavshesoko|k忙mavshesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavshesoko|thathamavshesoko]] || [[word:jajamavshesoko|jajamavshesoko]] || [[word:shashamavshesoko|shashamavshesoko]] || [[word:kakamavshesoko|kakamavshesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavshesoko|thamavshesoko]] || [[word:jamavshesoko|jamavshesoko]] || [[word:shamavshesoko|shamavshesoko]] || [[word:kamavshesoko|kamavshesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavshesoko|thamavshesoko]] || [[word:jamavshesoko|jamavshesoko]] || [[word:shamavshesoko|shamavshesoko]] || [[word:kamavshesoko|kamavshesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
